fields.label: Template Name
fields.description: Descriptive name for this prompt template

fields.label: Template Code
fields.description: Unique code identifier (e.g., desc-gen-standard, attr-extract-fashion)

fields.label: Is Active
fields.description: Whether this template is available for use

fields.label: Is Default
fields.description: Set as default template for its job type

fields.label: Job Type
fields.options:
Description Generation
Attribute Extraction
Classification Suggestion
Image Analysis
SEO Optimization
Translation
Content Enhancement
Quality Check
Custom
fields.description: Type of AI enrichment job this template is designed for

fields.label: Version
fields.description: Template version (e.g., 1.0, 2.1)

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Description of what this template does and when to use it

fields.label: Default AI Provider
fields.options:
Anthropic
OpenAI
Google Gemini
Azure OpenAI
AWS Bedrock
Custom
fields.description: Recommended AI provider for this template

fields.label: Default AI Model
fields.description: Recommended model (e.g., claude-3-sonnet, gpt-4-turbo)

fields.label: Default Temperature
fields.description: Recommended temperature setting (0.0-1.0)

fields.label: Default Max Tokens
fields.description: Recommended max tokens for response

fields.label: Requires JSON Output
fields.description: Whether the template expects structured JSON output

fields.label: Applicable Product Types
fields.description: Comma-separated list of product types this template works with (empty = all)

fields.label: Applicable Product Families
fields.description: Comma-separated list of product families (empty = all)

fields.label: Applicable Channels
fields.description: Comma-separated list of channels this template is optimized for (empty = all)

fields.label: Applicable Locales
fields.description: Comma-separated list of locales (empty = all)

fields.label: Target Attributes
fields.description: Comma-separated list of attribute codes this template generates values for

fields.label: System Prompt
fields.description: The system-level instructions that set the context for the AI

fields.label: System Prompt
fields.description: System prompt template. Supports Jinja2 variables like {{ company_name }}, {{ channel.name }}, etc.

fields.label: User Prompt Template
fields.description: The main prompt template with product data variables

fields.label: User Prompt Template
fields.description: Jinja2 template for the user prompt. Available variables: product, attributes, channel, locale, category, family, existing_values

fields.label: Output Format
fields.description: Expected format of AI response

fields.label: Output Schema
fields.description: JSON schema for validating structured output

fields.label: Post Processing
fields.options:
None
Trim Whitespace
Extract JSON
Parse Key-Value
Custom
fields.description: Post-processing to apply to AI response

fields.label: Post Processing Script
fields.description: Custom Python function for post-processing (receives 'response' variable)

fields.label: Available Variables
fields.description: Documentation of variables available in the template

fields.label: Variable Definitions
fields.description: JSON object defining available template variables and their types

fields.label: Custom Variables
fields.description: Custom static variables to inject into the template context

fields.label: Few-Shot Examples
fields.description: Example inputs and outputs for better AI results

fields.label: Include Examples in Prompt
fields.description: Whether to include few-shot examples in the prompt

fields.label: Max Examples
fields.description: Maximum number of examples to include

fields.label: Examples
fields.description: Array of {input: ..., output: ...} examples for few-shot learning

fields.label: Enable Output Validation
fields.description: Validate AI output before accepting

fields.label: Validation Rules
fields.description: JSON array of validation rules [{field: ..., rule: ..., message: ...}]

fields.label: Min Output Length
fields.description: Minimum character length for valid output

fields.label: Max Output Length
fields.description: Maximum character length for output (truncated if exceeded)

fields.label: Forbidden Patterns
fields.description: Regex patterns that should NOT appear in output (one per line)

fields.label: Total Uses
fields.description: Number of times this template has been used

fields.label: Successful Uses
fields.description: Number of successful enrichments

fields.label: Average Confidence
fields.description: Average confidence score of results

fields.label: Last Used At
fields.description: When this template was last used

fields.label: Average Tokens
fields.description: Average tokens consumed per use

fields.label: Created By
fields.description: User who created this template

fields.label: Tags
fields.description: Comma-separated tags for categorization

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Internal notes about this template
